{"widgets":[{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Lambda","Invocations",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","Duration",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","Errors",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","Throttles",{"stat":"Sum"}]],"period":300,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"Lambda Performance"}},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/ECS","CPUUtilization",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","MemoryUtilization",{"stat":"Average"}]],"period":300,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"ECS Cluster Health"}},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/RDS","CPUUtilization",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","DatabaseConnections",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","ReadLatency",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","WriteLatency",{"stat":"Average"}]],"period":300,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"RDS Database Performance"}},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/S3","BucketSizeBytes",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","NumberOfObjects",{"stat":"Average"}]],"period":86400,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"S3 Storage Usage"}},{"type":"log","properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, @message, @duration
| filter @message like /ERROR|FAILED/
| stats count() as ErrorCount by @message","region":"us-east-1","title":"Data Loader Errors (Last 24h)"}},{"type":"log","properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, loader, rows_inserted, duration
| stats sum(rows_inserted) as TotalRows, avg(duration) as AvgDuration by loader","region":"us-east-1","title":"Data Loader Performance Summary"}},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/APIGateway","Count",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","4XXError",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","5XXError",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","Latency",{"stat":"Average"}]],"period":300,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"API Gateway Performance"}},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/CloudFront","Requests",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","BytesDownloaded",{"stat":"Sum"}],[".","4xxErrorRate",{"stat":"Average"}],[".","5xxErrorRate",{"stat":"Average"}]],"period":300,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"CloudFront CDN Performance"},{"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Billing","EstimatedCharges",{"stat":"Maximum"}]],"period":86400,"stat":"Average","region":"us-east-1","title":"Estimated Daily Cost"}]}}
